description: A DFIR analyst needs to reconstruct the HTTP browsing session from a packet capture. Extract all HTTP packets (requests and responses) from /home/ga/Documents/captures/http.cap and produce a CSV file at /home/ga/Documents/captures/http_session_timeline.csv. The CSV must contain one row per HTTP packet, ordered by frame number, and include a header row with these columns: frame_number, time_relative, source_ip, destination_ip, http_method, http_request_uri, http_host, http_response_code, http_content_type, and frame_length. Ensure the fields capture the frame number, relative time in seconds, IPv4 addresses, HTTP request details (method, URI, host), HTTP response details
